recommendations.title: Made in U.S.A
recommendations.overview: Paula Nelson goes to Atlantic City to meet her lover, Richard Politzer, but finds him  dead and decides to investigate his death. In her hotel room, she meets Typhus, whom she ends up knocking out. His corpse is later found in the apartment of David

recommendations.title: Le Deuxième Souffle
recommendations.overview: A gangster escapes jail and quickly makes plans to continue his criminal ways elsewhere, but a determined inspector is closing in.

recommendations.title: Three from Prostokvashino
recommendations.overview: Little Fedor brings a cat to home despite his mother's distaste for cats. He runs away with his talking cat, to make more friends on the way.

recommendations.title: Rosalie Blum
recommendations.overview: Vincent Machot knows his life by heart. He shares it between his hair dressing salon, his cousin, his cat, and his too-invasive mother. But life sometimes holds surprises, even for the most prudent of people... He crosses paths with Rosalie Blum by a

recommendations.title: Magic Beyond Words: The J.K. Rowling Story
recommendations.overview: A look at J.K. Rowling from her humble beginnings as an imaginative young girl and awkward teenager, to the loss of her mother and the genesis of the Harry Potter book series.

recommendations.title: Love Is Overrated
recommendations.overview: Diagnosed «crap with girls» by his friends, Anis’ love life has barely a pulse. Three years after the loss of Isma, his best friend and mentor, Anis takes his courage in both hands and decides finally to get out and meet people again. And the person

recommendations.title: A Cat in Paris
recommendations.overview: A thrilling mystery that unfurls in the alleys and on the rooftops of the French capital, Paris, over the course of one adventurous evening.

recommendations.title: The Longest Week
recommendations.overview: Left broke and homeless by his wealthy parents' divorce, a young man moves in with an old friend and finally meets the woman of his dreams -- only to discover she's already dating his friend.

recommendations.title: A Very Long Engagement
recommendations.overview: Young Frenchwoman Mathilde searches for the truth about her missing fiancé, lost during World War I, and learns many unexpected things along the way. The love of her life is gone. But she refuses to believe he's gone forever — and she needs to know f

recommendations.title: The Evil Next Door
recommendations.overview: A dad moves into a new house with his son and girlfriend. When he's out of town working, the son makes a new "friend" next doors.
